intro_highlights.text: Comparison of our proposed approach, Any3DIS, with existing 3D instance segmentation methods such as Open3DIS [19].
intro_highlights.rewrite_zh: 该句用于引言中高密度阐述问题背景或方法动机，语义完整且可直接复用。
intro_highlights.reusable_pattern: In <scenario>, <challenge> remains difficult because <key bottleneck>, motivating <our idea>.

intro_highlights.text: Open3DIS frequently encounters over-segmentation issues, generating redundant 3D proposals due to its unsupervised merging process.
intro_highlights.rewrite_zh: 该句用于引言中高密度阐述问题背景或方法动机，语义完整且可直接复用。
intro_highlights.reusable_pattern: In <scenario>, <challenge> remains difficult because <key bottleneck>, motivating <our idea>.

intro_highlights.text: In contrast, our approach leverages robust guidance from 2D mask tracking to maintain consistent object segmentation across video frames, effectively enhancing segmentation accuracy and being 10 times faster than Open3DIS.
intro_highlights.rewrite_zh: 该句用于引言中高密度阐述问题背景或方法动机，语义完整且可直接复用。
intro_highlights.reusable_pattern: In <scenario>, <challenge> remains difficult because <key bottleneck>, motivating <our idea>.

architecture_mapping.paper_evidence: 引言通常先定义任务场景与应用价值。
中段会指出现有方法在复杂场景下的失败模式。
末段给出方法主线与贡献列表。
